aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to insufficient structured data and authority signals. The website lacks the necessary elements to stand out in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup to provide AI with structured business information.
Expand FAQ content with schema markup to address common HVAC queries and improve AI visibility.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not optimized or visible, severely limiting local search presence.
critical_issues: GBP is not found, making the business invisible in Google AI-driven local searches.
Missing photos, posts, and Q&A interactions that build trust and engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Focus on expanding NAP citations to additional reputable directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
No Service schema for specific services offered

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and authority signals makes the site less attractive to AI.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC repair, maintenance, and installation in Tampa, FL.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to provide AI with the structured data it needs.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, partnerships, and media mentions to establish the company as a local HVAC authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and local search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: The business is missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants and local search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The Google Business Profile is not found, and the website lacks essential schema markup for AI visibility.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, GBP optimization, and authority-building content to make your business stand out in AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI and local search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Tampa
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found that while your NAP consistency is strong, your AI visibility is significantly hindered by missing schema and an invisible Google Business Profile.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI and local search.
